MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2006 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-08-2006 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 218, SUE M KAPLAN FOR PROVE-UP HEARING. JUDGE: ROBERT DONDERO, CLERKS: VMU/LESPY/JIROQUE, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON #1558 (D206)
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-08-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
COURT TRIAL ON MAY-08-2006 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED, DEPT. 218, COMM. SUE KAPLAN, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, CSR: FLOYD BUTLER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKS, EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 217 EDDY ST., #203, SAN FRANCISCO $500.20 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.20, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Develpoment Corp., Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Roger Fennal, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Edward Hicks.
Exh. 1 - Assisted Lease Agreement---------------------ID/EVID.
Exh. 2 - Three-day Notice to pay rent or quit---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Edward Hicks as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 217 Eddy St., #203, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $500.20
No Attorney's Fees.
Waived Costs.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and Judgment signed in open court.
